overlay_messages:
Superset A: 
Heavy: 6-12 Pull-ups + 15-30 ATG Split Squats, 
Light: 6-12 Pull-ups + 8-20 Wall-assisted Sissy Squats

Superset B: 
Heavy: 6-12 Parallel Bar Leg-Assisted Dips + 8-20 Box Leg Curls, 
Light: 6-12 Parallel Bar Leg-Assisted Dips + 8-20 Wall-assisted Sissy Squats

Superset C: 
Heavy: 8-15 Inverted Ring Rows + 8-15 Push-ups, 
Light: 8-15 Inverted Ring Rows + 8-20 Wall-assisted Sissy Squats
